title: Just Another Modpack
description:
This is Just Another Minecraft Modpack.
Its a pretty big one, but it has most the mods you'd expect in a newer modpack.
body:
# About
This is a modpack that has most things that I believe you would see in an average newer modpack. with around 400 mods total, this modpack should have enough content for anyone.

# Major Mods
- [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) + Many Create Addons
- [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)
- [Zenith](https://modrinth.com/mod/zenith)
- [AE2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2)
- [CC: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked)
- [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks-(unoffical-fabric-port)) & [Sophisticated Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage-(unofficial-fabric-port))
- [Friends&Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes)
- [Expanded Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-storage)
- Many Structure Mods
- RPG Series of mods
- Many Decoration/Furniture Mods
- Various QoL Mods, Xaero's Minimap, EMI, Etc.
- Various Optimization Mods
- And many, many, many, many more

# Requirements
While testing I've been able to get this modpack running on as little as 4GB of memory, however I would recommend 6gb+ for stability.
